nasb.text: and after they came to Mysia, they were trying to go into Bithynia, and the Spirit of Jesus did not permit them;

esv.text: And when they had come up to Mysia, they attempted to go into Bithynia, but the Spirit of Jesus did not allow them.

cnv.text: 他們來到每西亞邊境，想要去庇推尼，耶穌的靈也不許。

ccb.text: 来到每西亚的边界，正要进入庇推尼地区，耶稣的灵又加以拦阻。

csbs.text: 他们来到密细亚地区的边界，试着要往比提尼亚省去，可是耶稣的灵不允许。
